Work/Life Balance
(you are here)
Work/Life Balance
Federal Personnel Flexibilities & Programs
The Missile Defense Agency makes every effort to elevate the quality of your workday and make it 
as satisfying as possible. We also believe in balancing work with personal obligations. To make these happen, we offer a range of federal personnel flexibilities and programs that support employees' physical and emotional well-being.
